Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

Class ReplaceWhileLoop

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.CreatingASTVisitor
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.ReplaceWhileLoop
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visitor
public class ReplaceWhileLoop extends CreatingASTVisitor
This visitor is used to identify and replace the while loop in invariant rule. It can be applied to EnhancedFors also.
See Also:
  • WhileInvariantTransformer
  • WhileInvariantTransformation
